monitor_the_situation.title: Iran Attacks Two Ships in Strait of Hormuz

— S3 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 4h ago. Iran attacked two ships in the Strait of Hormuz, escalating tensions as US escorts continue to use a non-Iranian corridor, threatening Iran's leverage over the waterway.
Israel Strikes Gaza City, Killing Three Palestinians
— S3 · Conflict · Gaza City, Palestine · 6h ago. An Israeli airstrike on Gaza City killed three Palestinians and injured more than 10, according to Al-Shifa Hospital staff.
Lebanon Says 4,297 Killed in Israeli Attacks Since March
— S3 · Conflict · Lebanon · 6h ago. Lebanon's Health Ministry reports 4,297 deaths and 12,196 wounded in Israeli attacks since March 2, 2026.
